title: ModernIndev
description: Beta Minecraft re-built on Modern Minecraft.
body:
# ![ModernIndev](https://i.imgur.com/G82sqCO.png)

**ModernIndev** is a Minecraft modpack thats inspired by the beta of the game that lets you relive the old school Minecraft in modern Minecraft!

## Features:
- Beta world generation. **(An option in the world creation screen)**
- Beta Splash Texts.
- No attack cooldown.
- Old crosshair.
- No Mojang Telemetery.
- Beta-like optimization.
- Old lightining, battle mechanic, animations, game mechanichs and textures (optional).
#
- **Minecraft: 1.20.1** 
- **Modpack Version: 1.0** 
- **Mod Loaders: Fabric, Forge**
#
## Version Difference
| Feature                      | **Fabric Version** | **Forge Version** |
| ---------------------------- | ---------------- | --------------------------- |
| Latest version               | 1.0.0              | 1.0.0                       |
| Renderer                     | Sodium             | Embeddium                   |
| Beta Nether                  | ✅ Yes            | ✅ Yes                       |
| No telemetery                | ✅ Yes            | ✅ Yes                       |
| Old Crosshair                | ✅ Yes            | ❌ No                        |
| Old Potions             | ✅ Yes            | ✅ Yes                       | 
| Old food system              | ✅ Yes            |❌ No                         |
| Old Splash Texts             | ✅ Yes            | ✅ Yes                       | 
| Old Loading Progress Bar             | ✅ Yes            | ✅ Yes                       | 
| Old Fishing                  | ✅ Yes            | ✅ Yes                       | 
| Nostalgia Features                 | ✅ Yes            | ❌ No                      | 
|No More Post Beta Flowers                 | ✅ Yes            | ✅ Yes                       |
| No End                       | ❌ No             | ❌ No                        |
| Overall Recommended                  | ✅ Yes              | ❌ No                          |
